title: How to share a single task?

posts.author: BENKO (Ben Korez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Guys,

I’m working with multiple tasks and each task is with a different person and those tasks are not related to any specific project.
How can I share/assign a single task without creating a board for each person?

Cheers / Ben.

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @BENKO, good question—thanks for posting!

What would you think of creating a board for everybody with all the tasks listed in one place? Then you could assign each task to a person: How to Assign Tasks to Your Teammates.

This article may also have some useful recommendations for organizing tasks What is a Task Board?

posts.author: BENKO (Ben Korez)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Taia, but the tasks are confidential between me, Legal, Finance, and others!
